} .retry-button { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #22ddd2 0%, #3b82f6 100%); color: white; border: none; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s ease; } .btn-primary { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0891b2, #0ea5e9); color: white; } .btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(8, 145, 178, 0.3); } .btn-secondary { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); color: #ffffff; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2); } .btn-secondary:hover { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2); transform: translateY(-2px); } .retry-button { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #10b981, #059669); color: white; margin-top: 16px; } ======= .retry-button:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(34, 221, 210, 0.3); } .status-indicator { margin-top: 2rem; padding: 1rem; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); .contact-info { margin-top: 32px; padding: 24px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); border-radius: 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); } .contact-info h3 { color: #0891b2; margin-bottom: 16px; font-size: 1.125rem; } .contact-links { display: flex; gap: 16px; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap; } .contact-link { color: #0ea5e9; text-decoration: none; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 8px; transition: all 0.3s ease; border: 1px solid transparent; } .contact-link:hover { background: rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.1); border-color: rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.3); } @media (max-width: 640px) { .offline-container { padding: 32px 24px; } h1 { font-size: 2rem; } .action-buttons { flex-direction: column; align-items: center; } .btn { width: 100%; max-width: 300px; justify-content: center; } ======= border-radius: 8px; font-size: 0.9rem; }
📡
